rationale: Section 48.2553 governs school district M&O tax rate authority when the basic allotment declines below 2020-2021 levels. The proposed homestead exemption increase does not alter or contradict these operative provisions, which are triggered by basic allotment changes, not exemption levels.
quote: if the maximum amount of the basic allotment provided under Section 48.051(a) or (b) for a school year is less than the maximum amount provided for the 2020-2021 school year
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect interaction possible: a larger homestead exemption reduces local taxable value, which could affect per-student revenue calculations referenced in §48.2553(b)(1) loss-of-funding statements, but the section's trigger is basic allotment decline, not exemption changes.
